hero.title: Architecting the Backbone of Modern Data Platforms
hero.subtitle_main: Designing high-performance data pipelines, governance frameworks, and automated deployment ecosystems. Transforming complex raw data into scalable, production-grade Lakehouse solutions that drive real business impact.
hero.expertise_tags: Azure Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, DBT, Spark, Medallion Architecture, CI/CD, Data Governance
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Data Engineer focused on architecting scalable, enterprise-grade data platforms within the Azure ecosystem. With 3+ years of experience, I design end-to-end Lakehouse architectures that transform fragmented raw data into structured, reliable and production-ready data systems.
about.p2: My expertise lies in building robust data foundations using Azure Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, DBT and Spark — implementing Medallion Architecture, governance frameworks and CI/CD automation to ensure performance, scalability and long-term maintainability. Passionate about transforming raw data into actionable business insight.
about.p3: I approach data engineering with an architectural mindset — designing systems that are modular, optimized and aligned with business strategy, not just technical requirements.
skills.title: Skills & Technologies
experience.title: Experience
exp.hexaview.b1: Architecting scalable Lakehouse solutions using Microsoft Fabric and Medallion Architecture to build structured, governance-driven data platforms.
exp.hexaview.b2: Designing and implementing end-to-end data pipelines integrating Azure Fabric, DBT and Spark-based transformations for enterprise-grade analytics.
exp.hexaview.b3: Developing dimensional data models and ensuring data lineage, quality and compliance through governance frameworks.
exp.hexaview.b4: Engineering CI/CD automation using Azure DevOps and Git to enable multi-environment deployments across tenants.
exp.hexaview.b5: Optimizing performance through incremental loading strategies, partitioning and efficient Spark transformations.
exp.celebal.b1: Designed and maintained scalable ETL pipelines in Azure Databricks using Spark and PySpark for large-scale data processing.
exp.celebal.b2: Led migration projects including Talend to Databricks and SharePoint to Databricks, ensuring transformation logic accuracy and data consistency.
exp.celebal.b3: Implemented Delta Lake-based architectures with structured Bronze, Silver and Gold layers for optimized storage and performance.
exp.celebal.b4: Applied data governance practices using Unity Catalog and Microsoft Purview to enhance metadata management and compliance.
exp.celebal.b5: Built automated CI/CD workflows for DLT pipelines and orchestrated deployments across development, staging and production environments.
exp.celebal.b6: Integrated IoT data with ADLS Gen2 via IoT Hub, transforming streaming data into business-ready datasets.
exp.celebal.b7: Delivered business-ready data models to Power BI teams, enabling real-time dashboards and performance monitoring solutions.
projects.title: Key Projects

projects.f2.b2: Automated multi-env deployments through Git-based CI/CD pipelines.
projects.f2.b3: Implemented dimensional modeling across data structures for quality and lineage tracking.
projects.f2.b4: Implemented data governance via Microsoft Purview.

projects.petronas.b2: Designed and developed efficient SQL queries to replicate Talend workflows in Databricks.
projects.petronas.b3: Created onboarding and transformation scripts to migrate and ensure data consistency.
projects.petronas.b4: Created Workflows and DLTs through CI/CD across environments.
projects.petronas.b5: Performed testing and reconciliation to validate accuracy and integrity of migrated data.

projects.ihcl.b5: Created dashboards for data analysis using Lakeview Dashboard and Power BI.
projects.cocacola.desc: Migrated SharePoint data to Databricks for a global beverage leader.
projects.cocacola.b1: Processed and managed data from SharePoint and Databricks sources with historical and incremental loads.
projects.cocacola.b2: Extracted, transformed, and cleaned structured and unstructured data from SharePoint.
projects.cocacola.b3: Applied custom transformation logic per business needs for reporting and analysis.
projects.cocacola.b4: Performed data validation and reconciliation, delivering business-ready datasets for Power BI visualization.
